license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.r9jd94n
title: Running an app on iMicrobe
author: Alise J Ponsero

steps_raw.instruction: After browsing through the iMicrobe datasets, the data of interest can be added to your personal cart using the 'Add to cart button'.The stored datasets can be vizualized, explored and removed using the Cart icon on the top right of your screen. Using the App search interface (select 'App' from the 'Tool' dropdown menu). Open the iMicrobe app of interest. In the Imput field, select 'Cart'. This will open a discussion window. Select the files that you need to run our analysis and confirm. Complete the app paramaters and run the app. a

Using the App search interface (select 'App' from the 'Tool' dropdown menu). Open the iMicrobe app of interest. In the Imput field, select 'Datastore'. This will open a browser window, allowing you to explore your Cyverse datastore. Select the files that you need to run our analysis and confirm. Complete the app paramaters and run the app. a
It is also possible to give the app an FTP URL as imput. Paste the FTP adresses, separated by semi-colons in the imput field and run the app. a
